justification: The diff updates Spring Boot to 3.3.13 and Java to 21, correctly migrating javax.servlet to jakarta.servlet and using String.formatted() (line 48 in DataController.java). However, it introduces spurious churn by removing @SpringBootApplication and @Profile imports in HirereaderApplication.java without replacing them, potentially breaking the application context. Additionally, adding both JUnit 4 and JUnit 5 dependencies while excluding JUnit from spring-boot-starter-test is inconsistent and unnecessary.
